_comment: Anthropic-shape response with a native tool_use block. This is the HAPPY path: the model picked math.add(2,3) via the protocol-native channel. OneShotStrategy.ParseResponse lifts (Name, Input) directly into ActionProposal{Command, Args} and concatenates any sibling text blocks into Thoughts.

content.text: I'll use the math tool to compute 2 + 3.
